title: Transportation Coordination for Hotel Guests in Egypt
trigger: Guest requests transportation services during their stay or upon arrival/departure.

steps.title: Receive Transportation Request
steps.action: Front desk staff receives a transportation request from a guest, either in person, via phone, or through the hotel's PMS.

steps.title: Verify Guest Details
steps.action: Verify the guest's details including name, room number, and preferred transportation type (e.g., taxi, shuttle, private car).

steps.title: Check Availability
steps.action: Check availability of the requested transportation service using the hotel's preferred vendors or internal resources.

steps.title: Confirm Booking
steps.action: Confirm the booking with the transportation provider and inform the guest of the details including pick-up time and location.

steps.title: Offer Alternative Solutions
steps.action: If the requested service is not available, offer alternative solutions such as different timings, another type of transportation, or a different provider.

steps.title: Escalate Issue
steps.action: If the guest declines all alternatives, escalate the issue to the Duty Manager for further assistance.

description: This playbook outlines the steps for coordinating transportation services for hotel guests in Egypt, ensuring a seamless experience from request to fulfillment.
